abilities.description: Intensifies Viper's venom, adding an effect to his normal attack that applies a stacking movement speed slow and magic resistance reduction while dealing damage over time. Stacks up to 5 times.
abilities.name: Poison Attack
abilities.story: The Netherdrake's inborn toxic breath quickly drains the vitality of its afflicted.

abilities.description: Viper releases a Nethertoxin at the targeted area. Units in that area take an increasing damage over time based on how long they remain in it. Units in it have their attack speed slowed.
abilities.name: Nethertoxin
abilities.story: Poison from the Nether Reaches turns wounds into fatalities, and fatigue into death.

abilities.description: Viper exudes an infectious toxin that damages and slows the attack speed of any enemy that damages it in a 1200 radius. The acid exudate also increases Viper's resistance to magic.
abilities.name: Corrosive Skin
abilities.story: It is not unusual for sword and shield alike to corrode in the very hands of those who attack the Netherdrake.

abilities.description: Viper slams into the ground, disarming each enemy in a 500 AoE for 2 seconds and splattering everyone in a 1200 AoE with the effect of Corrosive Skin.
abilities.name: Nosedive
abilities.story: It was thought that Netherdrake wings touch ground only in death, but some surmise that those who've witnessed more intentional landings merely haven't survived to tell the tale.

abilities.description: Viper slows the targeted enemy unit's movement and attack speed while also disabling their passives and dealing poison damage over time. The slowing effect reduces over the duration of the poison.
abilities.name: Viper Strike
abilities.story: Once used to slay his sadistic summoner, the most powerful of Netherdrake infections spreads through the veins of those foolish enough to cross Viper.

abilities.description: Changes Viper's primary attribute to Universal.
abilities.name: Become Universal

description: Poisonous toxins chip away armor and slow enemies. It was foolhardy to try and tame a Netherdrake, a lesson the old wizard learned in death. Freed from his captor, Viper spread his wings and went forth to explore the surface world. With Poison Attacks imbued with virulent liquid, causing joints to harden, crippling foes whether they choose to flee or fight. Nethertoxin spreads throughout their bodies, turning wounds into fatalities, and fatigue into death. The Netherdrake's tough, Corrosive Skin protects against spell-craft, and burns assailants with acid. But it is the dreaded Viper Strike that signals the beginning of the end. The afflicted victim staggers to a crawl, barely able to take its next step. If the Netherdrake doesn't finish his targets off, the venom in their veins will.  Carry Durable Initiator Disabler  Arachnophobic, Flying, Green, Wings, Nose Legs ( 0 )
trivia: Link▶️ "Holy shit, it's me!" is a reference to a scene of the movie Top Gun.[1] Gyrocopter makes a similar, yet more accurate Link▶️ response upon meeting him as an ally.
Gyrocopter makes a similar, yet more accurate Link▶️ response upon meeting him as an ally.
